commands.repair_reason: This maintainer-labeled Telegram authorization PR needs maintainer/live-proof review; there is no narrow automation repair to queue from the current diff.; Cleared: No concrete supply-chain or code-execution regression was found; the authorization-boundary concern is tracked as merge risk and proof requirement. (sha=fb121a205daf7a9e833f4ae2ae023e77d15394fa)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Telegram DM pairing authorization to avoid false pairing prompts after transient pairing-store read failures, skip unnecessary store reads for configured/open DMs, preserve text-fragment pairing checks, and add focused tests plus a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main catches pairing-store read failures as an empty allowlist before DM access, and that can flow into pairing challenge creation. I did not run a live Telegram reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: This maintainer-labeled Telegram authorization PR needs maintainer/live-proof review; there is no narrow automation repair to queue from the current diff.
